case_title: RAPHAEL GOINS VS. TODD M. SCHLESINGER

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-21-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-07-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL GOINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD M. SCHLESINGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOINS, RAPHAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOINS, RAPHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURS. TO CCP 116.850;
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00); PROOF OF SERVICE FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 SERVED APR-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-07-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL GOINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD SCHLESINGER IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT RETAINS RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-11-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL GOINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD SCHLESINGER IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT REQUESTS ONE TIME CONTINUANCE ONLY TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOINS, RAPHAEL
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $512.82 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON 12/04/2018, AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,108.36 FILED BY GOINS, RAPHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-07-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL GOINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD M. SCHLESINGER IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT RETAINS RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00); PROOF OF SERVICE FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 SERVED AUG-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOINS, RAPHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT IN FAILING TO REPAIR LEAKING PIPES, AND THE PRIOR LAWSUITS BETWEEN THESE PARTIES DID NOT DETERMINE PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS UNDER THIS CLAIM. DEFENDANT IS LIABLE BUT PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES ARE REDUCED FOR HIS FAILURE TO MITIGATE DAMAGES BY COVERING THE CARS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURS. TO CCP 116.850; FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHLESINGER, TODD M.
